The '''''Yakez''''' was a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] of the [[New Republic Fourth Fleet|New Republic Fourth Battle Group]] and the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet]].<ref name="TT" />

==History==
The ''Yakez'' served in the Fourth Fleet and was later reassigned to the inaugural [[New Republic Fifth Fleet]] because of the dire military threat that the [[Yevetha]]n [[Duskhan League]] posed to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Because of its size and armaments, it was the flagship of [[Task Force Apex]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], under the command of [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Farley Carson]].<ref name="TT" />

The ''Yakez'' was destroyed at the [[Battle of N'zoth]] when a pair of Yevethan [[Aramadia-class thrustship|thrustships]] battered its [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] down and caused the detonation of its forward magazine, breaking it in half.<ref name="TT" />
